problem.title: Check if Graph is Connected
problem.description:
Problem Statement
Using BFS or DFS, check if the entire graph is connected.

Input Format
n m
edges

Output Format
CONNECTED
NOT CONNECTED

Sample Input
4 2
1 2
3 4

Sample Output
NOT CONNECTED

solution.explanation: Perform DFS from node 1 using an adjacency matrix; if all nodes are visited the graph is connected.
